title: invitations — cache keys
description: Cache keys this module owns. Namespaced per tenant by CachePrefixTenantHook for tenant-scoped keys; un-prefixed keys called out explicitly.

keys.description: Reverse index: token_prefix (first 8 hex of token_hash) → { invitation_id, tenant_id }. Speeds up the GET /api/invitations/{token} lookup without hitting the DB unique index. Prefix-only lookup is safe because the caller must present the full raw token; the DB is still checked for state + expiry + hash match.
keys.note: Un-prefixed key — the /invitations/{token} endpoint is public and runs before tenant resolution.

keys.description: Per-inviter-user daily counter. Enforced by throttle.invitations middleware.
Cached count of non-terminal invitations for the admin dashboard header. Updated on state transitions via InvitationObserver.
Cached copy of the InvitationTargetRegistry map (target_type → { class, accept_handler }). Warmed at boot; refreshed on config-cache clear.
